name: Blair House
notes: 24-hour concierge confirmed on RentCafe and official blairapartments.com listing
Laundry facilities on every floor, NOT in-unit per RentCafe; some listings mention washer/dryer connections so individual units may vary
No pool found in any amenity list across multiple sources
Elevator confirmed by web search aggregation (high-rise building)
Balcony available on select units, confirmed across multiple listing sources
Pets allowed: dogs and cats, max 2 at 100 lbs each, $350 deposit + $45/month per pet, breed restrictions apply
Fitness center with yoga room confirmed
Unit climate control (AC/heat) not explicitly stated as in-unit or building-controlled in any source reviewed
Overall RentCafe rating 4.0/5 (29 reviews); maintenance rated 4.0/5; one review mentions mouse problem; staff rated 4.5/5
Part of the Blairs district, LEED platinum certified, managed by Tower Construction Group
